whenToUse.summary: Give valuable content (a free video or article) BEFORE asking for the opt-in - 'give before you take.' Lower raw conversion than a standard squeeze, but produces higher-quality, pre-sold leads because the visitor's walls drop first.
goals: Prioritize quality of leads over raw volume
signals: You have a strong teaching/demo asset
doNotUseWhen: You are optimizing for pure list volume (use Squeeze)
Traffic is so cold it won't watch a video (use the article Bridge variant)

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver an epiphany/value upfront with no gate, lowering the visitor's resistance.
blocks: Headline naming the result the free video/article delivers
Embedded free video OR full article
Soft 'want more?' transitional CTA placed BELOW the content

pageStructure.purpose: Capture the email to unlock a bonus or continuation of the content.

copyFramework.script: Epiphany Bridge delivered IN the free content (so the viewer adopts the new belief), followed by a StoryBrand transitional Call-to-Action to opt in for more.
copyFramework.notes: The content must be genuinely valuable; the opt-in is the natural next step after the epiphany, not a gate slammed in the visitor's face.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Expert Guide
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: Epiphany Bridge Script (Backstory > Journey > New Opportunity > Framework > Achievement > Transformation)
Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + 3 Secrets + The Stack + Close)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Belief-shifting storytelling; transfer your conviction in the vehicle to the prospect.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Story Brander
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Donald Miller
owns_scripts: SB7 BrandScript: Character > Problem (external/internal/philosophical) > Guide (empathy + authority) > Plan > Call to Action (direct + transitional) > Success > Failure/Stakes
StoryBrand homepage wireframe (header, stakes, value prop, guide, plan, explanatory, junk-drawer)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Clarity over cleverness; no dead ends.

skill44Widgets: Video embed on the content page
Opt-in Form widget on the gate
Optional Calendar widget if the bonus is a booked session
ghlBuild.notes: Place the opt-in below the fold after the value is delivered. Segment those who actually consumed the content.
